blended.narrative: Mount Washington is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.3 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 798 ft. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.9" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 8" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
